stemHtml: CAT II, Special Authorisation (SA) CAT II or CAT III operations can only be conducted by an operator if...

options.a: all height call-outs below 500 ft above the runway threshold elevation are determined by a radio altimeter and the flight crew consists of at least 2 members.
options.b: all height call-outs below 500 ft above the runway threshold elevation are determined by a radio altimeter and the flight crew consists of at least 1 member, in case of single pilot operations.
options.c: all height call-outs below 200 ft above the runway threshold elevation are determined by a radio altimeter and the flight crew consists of at least 2 members.
options.d: all height call-outs below 200 ft above the runway threshold elevation are determined by a radio altimeter and the flight crew consists of at least 3 members, the 3rd one being a safety pilot.
